economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations including reduced Dakota Dunes CDC and First Nations Trust revenues due to SIGA casino closures. First Nation involved in Touchwood Agency Specific Claim regarding alleged mismanagement of funds 1920-1924. Real estate partnership formed with Indigena KFN Real Estate ULC. Ministerial audit by ISC-FNIHB ongoing.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021), audited November 14, 2022 - significant delay in audit completion. Six entities consolidated including CMHC Housing, Business Development Corporation, Asiniw Resources Ltd., 101159591 Saskatchewan Ltd. (KFN Market Husky), Kawacatoose Enterprises, and Kawacatoose General Store Limited Partnership. Kawacatoose Treaty Land Entitlement Trust and Kawacatoose Specific Claim Trust excluded as not controlled by Chief and Council. Long-term debt includes both CMHC housing loans ($1,815,805) and Peace Hills Trust loans ($3,384,695) plus capital lease obligations ($248,191). CMHC reserves underfunded by $337,044. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($11,893,682) minus CMHC ($136,800) = $7,323,744; however Touchwood Agency Tribal Council and Dakota Dunes CDC may also be government transfers - total_government_transfers estimated as ISC plus CMHC only. Net debt position of $11,313,720.
